svg.text: Control: RuntimeCtrlMsg (shutdown) • PipelineCompletionMsg (ack/nack) • watch::channel (memory pressure) • MetricsReporter (MPSC)
CPU 0 • pinned thread-1 • tokio LocalSet • single-threaded async
PipelineCtrl: timers • ack/nack unwind • telemetry • memory pressure
CPU 1 • pinned thread-2 • tokio LocalSet • single-threaded async
PipelineCtrl: timers • ack/nack unwind • telemetry • memory pressure
Shared channel (cross-thread, Send+Sync, e.g. Tonic gRPC receiver)
